top_signals.title: FBI: Americans lost over $388 million to scams using crypto ATMs in 2025
top_signals.summary: The FBI says Americans have lost over $388 million last year to scams using cryptocurrency kiosks, also known as crypto ATMs or Bitcoin ATMs. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
